definition: A critical conceptual unit within the top term domain of the Exegesis. Mentions: 1097.
interpretive_note: Primary Source Evidence: "...I never after that "found" myself in daytime in an earlier moment, such as Crete, but recalled them in dreams; those were the foundations of Christianity. The Rome-Christ period was actually there and actually experienced during full wakefulness, as present. Yet, it was still now. But now He has returned. I was now and yet superimposed Rome of 2000 years ago: 1974 Fullerton and Rome c 45. I gather..."
card_description:
A critical conceptual unit within the top term domain of the Exegesis. Mentions: 1097. Referenced 1097 times across the corpus. Spirit appears 1097 times in the Exegesis corpus. From the Exegesis: "I just had a bizarre thought. The decay backward of forms which Joe Chip sees...it is not decay. This is not retrogression. It is the retrograde axis.

We already pointed this axis out --the one he..." Segment context: "The author writes to Claudia, interpreting the "decay backward of forms" seen by the character Joe Chip in the novel *UBIK* as movement along the "orthogonal" axis of time." Related to: Acts, Advent, Anamnesis, Because, Bible.
full_description:
A critical conceptual unit within the top term domain of the Exegesis. Mentions: 1097. Referenced 1097 times across the corpus. Spirit appears 1097 times in the Exegesis corpus. From the Exegesis: "I just had a bizarre thought. The decay backward of forms which Joe Chip sees...it is not decay. This is not retrogression. It is the retrograde axis.

We already pointed this axis out --the one he..." Segment context: "The author writes to Claudia, interpreting the "decay backward of forms" seen by the character Joe Chip in the novel *UBIK* as movement along the "orthogonal" axis of time." Related to: Acts, Advent, Anamnesis, Because, Bible.

**Category:** Top Term

**Frequency:** 1097 mentions.

**From the Exegesis:**
> I just had a bizarre thought. The decay backward of forms which Joe Chip sees...it is not decay. This is not retrogression. It is the retrograde axis.

We already pointed this axis out --the one he sees in UBIK-- as the orthogonal one. Now I say, its retrograde motion, expressed in the novel, is ...
> This is why (uniquely for me) my thoughts and phosphene activity speeded up in March so that the rate was beyond count. My personal time used itself up...but for me the actual Fulfillment of Time wsa quite different from the Day of Wrath under acid in 1964, ten years or so earlier. I saw the Day ...
> karma on me, not really; I had that lesson in me, that understanding. Yet -- I felt sorry for the rat, since it didn't want to die. The lesson was for me the hardest of all: that things must be done in response to decissions or considerations or needs or directive or to accord with a higher moral...

evidence.text:
I just had a bizarre thought. The decay backward of forms which Joe Chip sees...it is not decay. This is not retrogression. It is the retrograde axis.

We already pointed this axis out --the one he sees in UBIK-- as the orthogonal one. Now I say, its retrograde motion, expressed in the novel, is its proper development, its own forward.

This "decay" is the same direction the Holy Spirit (or whatever you wish to deem it) was moving. Backward vis-a-vis our own time. So Joe Chip isn't seeing the an

This is why (uniquely for me) my thoughts and phosphene activity speeded up in March so that the rate was beyond count. My personal time used itself up...but for me the actual Fulfillment of Time wsa quite different from the Day of Wrath under acid in 1964, ten years or so earlier. I saw the Day of Judgment this time, when it wsa real, only that Sunday night when the pale white light filled the room and I once more knew death was there, and began to pray frantically in Latin, exactly as I had do

karma on me, not really; I had that lesson in me, that understanding. Yet -- I felt sorry for the rat, since it didn't want to die. The lesson was for me the hardest of all: that things must be done in response to decissions or considerations or needs or directive or to accord with a higher morality which make it binding on one to take life. Therefore I saw the role that death had in the universe: a necessary one (clay pots have to be deliberately thrown back as long as they remain unsatisfactor

THE RED FEATHER by Dorothy Canfield Fisher (I had my copy until 1972 when I was in Canada and they robbed me a final time), that was what they call my Script.

A little girl, Rosemary, was born, but the fairies came and they swept her away in a shower of sparks (this is what I saw when I was aware of Erasmus: magic fairy sparks). But maybe ours it the desired product, and also more stable. Again, the two light sources pouring through frames of film...

That Holy Spirit which engulfed me in March 74 was, I felt then, traveling backward in time...doesn't my experience of this, if it be correct, fit in with a theory that "they" are going back in time to tinker with some moment in the far past? The Spirit stopped to help out here, on its way back to the Crucifixion; there, it will (or did) help out, thus setting up another time-line entirely. Thus, all will already have been saved by the Savi

This news (in Psy Today) about the pineal body being a light-receiving organ or gland is so exciting to me because it means that the chromatic phosphene source I experienced did not merely go to the light-sensitive part of my brain, but also to my pineal gland. Since the pineal gland is the "third eye" actually, scientifically speaking, as the Hindus believed, this is thrilling (and helps explain my dreams of the three-eyed people, also ratifying their significance and ratiofying that indeed the

The conduit is the optic nerve, the eye the receptor percept organs, but the message is to the pineal body, not the brain. Generally, photon light messages travel to brain-reception; but as the Psy Today article shows, some are "intended" for the pineal body (springtime).

One could speculate that this is the purpose of human beings: Why We Are Here -- to serve as the recipient "female" "mothers" for the implantations of the solar spermatika, the divine seeds. Curiously, this wou
